command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Find Remy's Telegram bot token in openclaw config ==="
REMY_TOKEN=$(grep -rhoE "[0-9]{9,10}:[A-Za-z0-9_-]{35}" /home/jose/.openclaw/ 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -3)
echo "tokens found: $REMY_TOKEN"

echo ""
echo "=== Telegram channel config in openclaw.json ==="
python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json'))
ch = d.get('channels', {})
print('channels keys:', list(ch.keys()) if isinstance(ch, dict) else ch)
tg = ch.get('telegram', {}) if isinstance(ch, dict) else {}
print('telegram channel config:', json.dumps(tg, indent=2)[:800])
" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== For each token, check getMe + webhook/polling status ==="
for TK in $REMY_TOKEN; do
  echo "--- token ${TK:0:12}... ---"
  curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TK}/getMe" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('result',{}); print('  bot:', r.get('username'), '| can_read_groups:', r.get('can_read_all_group_messages'))" 2>/dev/null
  curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TK}/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('result',{}); print('  webhook url:', repr(r.get('url')), '| pending:', r.get('pending_update_count'))" 2>/dev/null
done
REMOTE
